name: EcoFlow RIVER 2 Pro Portable Power Station
introText: The EcoFlow RIVER 2 Pro is 768Wh with the same 70-minute fast charging as the DELTA 2 in a more portable 7.8kg package — the best mid-range power station for solo campers and van life at $599 CAD.
whatWorks: 70-minute fast charge in the most portable large-format power station — the RIVER 2 Pro brings EcoFlow's signature charging speed to a 7.8kg package that one person can easily carry.
768Wh handles a full weekend of camping power — 12V fridge (40W = 19 hours), laptops (2 full charges), and phone charging for 3–4 days of mixed use.
worthKnowing: 800W AC output won't power large appliances — electric kettles (1500W), electric skillets, and space heaters exceed its AC output. It's for camping gear and electronics, not home appliances.
220W solar input is lower than the DELTA 2 — full solar charge takes longer. Pair with two 110W solar panels for best solar performance.

commonComplaints.title: 800W AC output is limiting
commonComplaints.body: The RIVER 2 Pro's 800W limit means many AC appliances (kettles, hair dryers, coffee makers) are borderline or exceed capacity.

commonComplaints.title: Fan is noticeable at max output
commonComplaints.body: Running near the 800W limit triggers audible fan cooling. Acceptable outdoors, noticeable in a tent or van.

commonComplaints.title: Less capacity than the DELTA 2 at not that much less cost
commonComplaints.body: At $400 less than the DELTA 2 but with 25% less capacity, the value gap narrows for users who can stretch the budget.

verdict: The EcoFlow RIVER 2 Pro is the best power station for solo campers and van life users who want 70-minute charging in a portable package. If you need 1800W output or more capacity, the DELTA 2 is worth the $400 premium.

realBuyers.quote: Solo camping weekend. 768Wh powers my 12V fridge, phone, laptop, and camp lights for 2 full days.
Charge it in the morning before hitting the trail. 70 minutes and it's full.
Van life essential. Light enough to move easily, powerful enough for everything I need.

metaDescription: EcoFlow RIVER 2 Pro review Canada: 768Wh LFP, 800W output, 70-min fast charge, 7.8kg. $599 CAD. Best mid-range power station for Canadian campers.
